name: Iso11783IL_PDDGetLastErrorText
title: Iso11783IL_PDDGetLastErrorText
syntax: long Iso11783IL_PDDGetLastErrorText( dword bufferSize, char buffer[] );
description: This function returns as a string the error description of the function of this node layer most recently executed.

parameters.name: bufferSize
parameters.description: size of the buffer into which the error text is copied
